title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 84.890 - Holidays — set apart by chief
text:
84.890.  Holidays — set apart by chief. — Upon the taking effect of section 84.870, the board of police commissioners of all cities of one hundred thousand inhabitants and over shall make an order instructing the chief of police to set apart the days in each month each police officer is entitled to under section 84.870.
(RSMo 1939 § 7587) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7444; 1919 § 8852; 1909 § 9701
